# TheAlphaOnes

> An independent umbrella organisation behind developer tools, software products, and experimental systems.

TheAlphaOnes (taohq.org) builds thoughtful software, systems, and lifestyle products. The organisation operates under principles of calm infrastructure and scalable craft.

## Ventures

- **Common Design** — Shared design infrastructure for consistent product language, calmer defaults, and repeatable interaction patterns across ventures.
- **Sober.Spend** — A quieter financial tool that helps people read spending clearly and make deliberate choices without unnecessary interface pressure.
- **Fold.tao** — A structured notes and workflow system designed around low-friction capture, review, and operational clarity over time.
- **TheAlphaOnes** — The umbrella operating layer behind tools, products, and experiments that need shared infrastructure without losing craft.

## Principles

- **Calm Infrastructure** — Systems that prioritize utility over disruption, operating with quiet reliability.
- **Scalable Craft** — Technical thoughtfulness that anticipates failure states and designs robust architectures.

## Links

- Website: https://www.taohq.org
- Contact: https://www.taohq.org/#contact
